role_title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Hosting Services

location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 7+ years of experience in the software development industry, with at least 5 years as a TPM
Comp range $179K-$210K base, consistent with Senior IC
Role title explicitly 'Senior Technical Program Manager'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of experience in the software development industry, with at least 5 years as a TPM or relevant experience
must_haves.qualifier: at least 5 of which as a TPM or relevant experience

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience using AI to automate manual processes to improve you and your team's productivity
Demonstrated ability to work through ambiguity to detailed solutions. You can take a vague problem, crisply frame the challenge, identify a path forward, and drive an initiative over the finish-line.
Self-motivated, proactive and proven ability to adapt well and work with teams having different operating cadences.
Sound business judgment, a proven ability to influence others, strong analytical skills, and a track record of taking ownership, leading data driven analyses, and influencing results
Experience with ML models, LLMs, LRMs, feature development, model testing and resource management to support the development of AI-powered product experiences.
Familiar with A/B testing, incremental delivery and deployment.
Ability to ramp up quickly and learn new technologies with minimal lag time.
Excellent written and oral business communication and people skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience developing or working directly on various aspects of large-scale ML/AI platforms.
Experience with feature development of AI-powered product experiences.
Experience and passion for building and maintaining products leveraging AI models

scope.surface: Hosting Services — co-host matching and management tools, campaign delivery, host referrals
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform (B2C and B2B2C hosting ecosystem)
core_responsibilities: Develop and manage comprehensive project plans to execute on initiatives, identify key milestones and ensure alignment across stakeholders
Think both broadly about overall outcomes while using good judgment on where to focus in on details
Influence the technical direction of projects to meet the stakeholders' needs while upholding quality
Define and align on success criteria for both short term and long term business goals, regularly assessing risks and opportunities and identifying mitigation strategies
Manage effective communication channels to keep a wider range of stakeholders updated on the progress
Showcase the work in front of senior leaders, clearly communicate trade-offs, risks, and opportunities

compensation.equity_form: bonus and equity mentioned as potentially eligible

green_flags: Clear product surface and team mission described
Encourages all qualified individuals to apply
red_flags: Must live in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity — some states are excluded and the exclusion list is continuously evolving
Visa sponsorship not explicitly addressed — unclear status
Hard requirement for ML/LLM experience may be difficult to mitigate for traditional TPM candidates without AI domain background
JD heavily emphasizes AI/ML tools adoption as a cultural expectation, which may be a bar beyond standard TPM skill sets

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years requirement + title)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated)
location.work_auth (inferred as no-sponsorship from 'must live in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity' language; sponsorship not explicitly mentioned)
ambiguities: Visa sponsorship is not explicitly mentioned in the JD. The state-eligibility restriction implies US-based employment but does not directly address work authorization requirements. Marked as 'unclear'.
The JD states 'This role may also be eligible for bonus, equity, benefits' — eligibility is conditional, not guaranteed.
